name: Rocket Mania
short_description: Compare your scores on the Steam Leaderboards! Navigate through obstacles like spinners, and oscilators. Apply boost to keep your rocket in the air. Speedrun against your friends, or try to get as far as you can in the game without crashing!
detailed_description:
Welcome to Rocket Mania! Fly your rocket of choice through an epic adventure taking you across the earth, over the moon, and beyond!

In Rocket Mania you have full control of the rocket as you try avoid crashing into obstacles getting from launch to landing pad across 30 levels!

Features include:

  • Steam Leaderboards!
  • Collect 6 Skins!
  • Two alternate game modes!
  • Set best times on every level!
  • 39 Achievements to grind for!
